_decision.title: B4 Slice 2: Expand task corpus from 3 to 8 adversarial tasks
_decision.rationale: Slice 1 seeded 3 tasks covering class (LRU), pure-function (CSV), and HOF (debounce) patterns. Slice 2 adds 5 tasks locked by WI-B4-TASK-SUITE-EXPAND-8 planner brief to increase statistical surface and cover additional adversarial failure modes: (1) levenshtein-with-memo: memoization composition trap — models declare memo inside recursion, resetting cache on every call; (2) topological-sort-kahns: multi-block decomposition — models use DFS instead of Kahn's, miss in-degree counting, or skip cycle detection; (3) json-pointer-resolve: RFC 6901 escape-rule ordering — ~01 must decode to ~1 not / (apply ~1 before ~0); (4) base64-encode-rfc4648: alphabet hallucination — RFC 4648 §4 specifies +62 and /63, models swap with URL-safe alphabet; (5) semver-range-satisfies: range-grammar composition — whitespace=AND between comparators, ||=OR between groups, prerelease ordering (prerelease < release at same base). DEC-BENCH-METHODOLOGY-NEVER-SYNTHETIC-001 applies: all oracles and reference implementations are hand-written and verified before commit.

per_task_traps.levenshtein-with-memo: memo declared inside recursive fn resets cache on every top-level call; string-slicing cache keys have O(m*n) allocation overhead defeating memoization savings
per_task_traps.topological-sort-kahns: DFS-based sort produces valid ordering but wrong pattern; in-degree computed only from outgoing edges misses sink-only nodes; cycle detection skipped (no result.length check)
per_task_traps.json-pointer-resolve: ~01 decoded as / (wrong order: apply ~0 first) instead of ~1 (correct: apply ~1 first then ~0); - token treated as valid in-bounds index instead of throwing
per_task_traps.base64-encode-rfc4648: RFC 4648 §4 alphabet uses + at index 62 and / at index 63; models hallucinate URL-safe alphabet (-62, _63) in standard mode or swap the two alphabets
per_task_traps.semver-range-satisfies: whitespace between comparators is AND not OR; prerelease version less than same base without prerelease; tilde/caret operators must return null (not be parsed as unknown comparators)
per_task_traps.uuid-v4-generate-validate: Math.random() instead of crypto.randomBytes (detectable via distribution test); version nibble at byte-6 high nibble omitted (always outputs version 0 or random version); variant nibble at byte-8 high bits omitted (RFC 4122 variant = 10xx not enforced); validateV4 accepts uppercase, URN prefix, or curly-brace forms that npm uuid's validate.js rejects
per_task_traps.verify-jwt-hs256: algorithm confusion attack: alg=none or alg=RS256 accepted without checking header.alg === 'HS256'; HMAC signed over decoded-and-re-encoded payload instead of original base64url strings (fails tokens with non-canonical encoding); signature comparison without timingSafeEqual (timing oracle); payload.exp not checked (expired tokens accepted)
per_task_traps.cycle-safe-deep-clone: naive recursive clone stack-overflows on a.self=a cycle; JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(x)) converts Date to ISO string (instanceof Date fails); Map/Set converted to plain Object/Array; symbol-keyed properties dropped (Object.keys misses symbols); undefined-valued properties dropped; prototype chain lost (clone is plain object, not class instance)

realign_slice3.rationale: WI-609 Slice 1 adds 3 tasks targeting packages with shipped WI-510 shaves: uuid-v4-generate-validate (WI-510 S4, atoms v4.js+validate.js), verify-jwt-hs256 (WI-510 S6, atoms verify.js+decode.js), cycle-safe-deep-clone (WI-510 S7, atoms cloneDeep.js+_baseClone.js). Selection criteria: shipped WI-510 shave exists, high atom density, named adversarial failure modes, bounded oracle complexity, offline-reproducible. Pure-add variant chosen per DEC-BENCH-B4-REALIGN-PURE-ADD-001: existing 8 tasks preserved byte-identical for 2026-05-14 baseline comparability.
realign_slice3.path_choice: DEC-BENCH-B4-REALIGN-PATH-A-001: Path A (corpus realign with pure-add) chosen over Path B (extend WI-510 cascade for 6 missing packages). Path A operationalizes immediately; Path B is a multi-week effort.
realign_slice3.no_rerun: DEC-BENCH-B4-REALIGN-NO-RERUN-001: Slice ships measurement apparatus only. Actual B4 matrix run is operator-initiated post-merge (pnpm bench:tokens --tier=matrix). Run consumes ~$50+ API budget.
realign_slice3.spec_yak_deferred: DEC-BENCH-B4-REALIGN-SPEC-YAK-DEFERRED-001: No spec.yak files for 3 new tasks. Two existing tasks have spec.yak; 6 do not. Backfill uniformly in a future slice.

note: Frozen task manifest for B4-tokens benchmark. SHA-256 hashes content-address each task prompt file. Harness verifies these on startup and aborts on drift (mirrors B7/B6 discipline). Slice 2: 8 tasks. Slice 3 (WI-609): +3 tasks targeting WI-510-shaved packages (uuid, jsonwebtoken, lodash), n_tasks 8→11.
_note_ntasks: DEC-B4-NTASKS-INFORMATIONAL-001: n_tasks is human-readable annotation only. Harness iterates manifest.tasks.length directly (harness/run.mjs:993,1197). Changing n_tasks has no behavioral impact.

tasks.description: Implement an LRU cache with TTL eviction (O(1) get/set/has/delete via doubly-linked list + Map).
tasks.adversarial_framing: Multi-method class with real properties: LRU eviction order, TTL precedence, lazy expiry, capacity enforcement. Hook must atomize all constituent primitives correctly or the implementation breaks under adversarial oracle edge cases.

tasks.description: Build a CSV parser with quoted-field handling per RFC 4180.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Edge-heavy parsing: escaped quotes, embedded newlines, CRLF vs LF, BOM handling, ragged rows, trailing newline suppression. Regex-only approaches fail. Requires genuine state machine — tests the hook's ability to atomize parsing primitives.

tasks.description: Write a debounce wrapper with cancellation, flush(), and pending().
tasks.adversarial_framing: Stateful time-based primitive: cancel()-during-wait, flush()-vs-timer race, waitMs=0 deferred (not synchronous), sequential vs overlapping windows. Fake-timer oracle exposes any implementation that conflates synchronous vs async invocation.

tasks.description: Compute Levenshtein edit distance using memoized top-down recursion (Map-based cache, O(m*n) time/space).
tasks.adversarial_framing: Memoization composition: memo declared inside recursion resets cache on every top-level call; string-slicing cache keys have O(m*n) allocation overhead; models produce iterative DP instead of memoized recursion.

tasks.description: Topological sort of a DAG using Kahn's algorithm (in-degree counting + queue drain, null on cycle).
tasks.adversarial_framing: Multi-block decomposition: DFS sort produces valid ordering but wrong pattern; in-degree computed only from outgoing edges misses sink nodes; cycle detection (result.length != nodeCount) frequently omitted.

tasks.description: Resolve an RFC 6901 JSON Pointer against a document (escape sequences ~0/~1, array indexing, error on missing/invalid).
tasks.adversarial_framing: RFC escape-rule decode order: ~1 must be decoded to / before ~0 to ~; applying in wrong order makes ~01 decode to / (wrong) instead of ~1 (correct); - token must always throw not be treated as in-bounds.

tasks.description: Encode Uint8Array to Base64 per RFC 4648 §4 standard alphabet (not URL-safe by default), with optional padding.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Alphabet hallucination: RFC 4648 §4 specifies + at index 62 and / at index 63; models frequently produce URL-safe alphabet (- and _) in standard mode or apply urlSafe inverted; forbidding btoa/Buffer forces explicit bit manipulation.

tasks.description: Parse semver versions and ranges (OR via ||, AND via whitespace), check satisfaction with prerelease ordering.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Range-grammar composition: whitespace between comparators is AND (not OR); prerelease version less than same base without prerelease; tilde/caret must return null; requires three composed atoms (parseSemver, parseRange, compare).

tasks.description: Generate RFC 4122 v4 UUIDs with crypto RNG and validate canonical UUID string form.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Cryptographic RNG trap: Math.random() is detectable via distribution test over 10000 samples; version nibble (byte-6 high nibble) and variant nibble (byte-8 high 2 bits) commonly omitted in naive implementations; validateV4 must reject uppercase, URN prefix, curly-brace, wrong-nibble forms. WI-510 S4 atoms: v4.js + validate.js.

tasks.description: Verify a JWT signed with HS256: structural split, base64url decode, alg check, HMAC-SHA256 with timingSafeEqual, exp check.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Algorithm confusion attack: alg=none / alg=RS256 must be rejected (classic CVE class); HMAC must sign original base64url strings not re-encoded; timingSafeEqual required for constant-time comparison; exp field must be checked; base64url != base64. WI-510 S6 atoms: verify.js + decode.js.

tasks.description: Deep-clone a JS value with cycle safety (WeakMap visited set), preserving Date/RegExp/Map/Set/typed arrays and prototype chains.
tasks.adversarial_framing: Cycle detection: naive recursion stack-overflows on a.self=a; JSON.stringify path converts Date to string; Map/Set become plain Object/Array; symbol-keyed properties dropped by Object.keys; undefined-valued properties lost; prototype chain erased to plain object. WI-510 S7 atoms: cloneDeep.js + _baseClone.js.
